candidates.name: Stock Price Context Overlay
candidates.pitch: Integrates with free Yahoo Finance endpoints to show ticker context on LinkedIn/company pages. Overlay injection is straightforward. Existing tools lack the in-page context at point-of-view moment.
candidates.pain: Sales reps lose deals when they miss stock price movements that signal a prospect's financial health or urgency.

candidates.name: GCP Resource Tag Completeness Checker
candidates.pitch: Integrates with GCP Resource Manager API to list resources and their tags, displays badge on non-compliant resources in the GCP Console. Tag policy enforcement gap is common at scale.
candidates.pain: GCP admins get surprise billing because resources were launched without required cost-center tags.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: Academic Citation Claim Verifier
candidates.pitch: When a PDF or paper page is viewed, parses citations and cross-references against Semantic Scholar API for claim verification. No API access for many publishers so PDF parsing is the path.
candidates.pain: Researchers waste hours chasing citations that don't support the claims made in the papers they read.

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link

candidates.name: Ad Landing Page Performance Spy
candidates.pitch: Detects when a LinkedIn/email click lands on a page, injects performance metrics overlay (load time, Core Web Vitals) and screenshot preview. Useful for sales teams running ad campaigns.
candidates.pain: Marketers launching cold outreach can't verify if the landing pages prospects visit are live, fast, or matching the ad copy.

candidates.name: Interview Question Context Injector
candidates.pitch: On LinkedIn profile pages, injects a sidebar with past interview questions the candidate may have answered publicly (HN, podcasts, GitHub). Scrapes public data only, no PII scraping.
candidates.pain: Recruiters and hiring managers go into interviews without context on candidates' publicly available professional history.
